name: test_videos
rule: Test Video Gen always produces two fixed clips: ocean/"CALM WATERS" followed by mountains/"PEAK VIEWS". The Ideator generates creative scene ideas within these themes, keeping prompts simple so the pipeline focuses on exercising tooling, not creative variance.
guidelines: Ideator generates creative variations for each scene while staying within the theme.
Clip 1 theme = ocean/water, overlay header = "CALM WATERS".
Clip 2 theme = mountains/peaks, overlay header = "PEAK VIEWS".
Keep prompts lightweight and literal so we can quickly verify the run end-to-end.
Final videos are published to the AISMR account.
